home.descNormal: Enter your salary details to calculate your monthly take-home pay
home.descReverse: Enter your desired monthly take-home pay to find the required annual salary
home.basedOnDesiredNet: Based on desired monthly net {amount} KRW
home.disclaimer: This calculation is based on the 2026 Korean simplified wage income tax table and is for reference only. It has no legal effect. Actual take-home pay may vary depending on year-end tax adjustment and additional deductions. Please consult the National Tax Service or a tax professional for accurate calculations.

validation.salaryMin: Annual salary must be at least 1,000,000 KRW
validation.enterDesiredNet: Please enter your desired monthly take-home pay
validation.desiredNetMin: Monthly take-home must be at least 100,000 KRW
validation.desiredNetMax: Monthly take-home pay is too large
validation.nonTaxableMin: Non-taxable amount must be 0 or more
validation.dependentsMin: Dependents must be at least 1 (including self)
validation.childrenMin: Number of children must be 0 or more

salaryTable.pageDesc: Monthly take-home pay calculated for annual salaries from 10M to 100M KRW in 1M increments. Based on 100,000 KRW/month non-taxable, 1 dependent (self), 0 children.
salaryTable.guideIncomeTax: Based on simplified tax table (1 dependent, 0 children)
salaryTable.guideNote: * Based on 100,000 KRW/month non-taxable. Actual take-home pay may vary by individual deductions.

monthly.explanation: To receive {target}M KRW/month after tax, you need an annual salary of approximately {annual} KRW.
monthly.basis: Based on 2026 | Non-taxable 100K KRW/mo, 1 dependent (self), 0 children

severance.title: Severance Pay Calculator
severance.desc: Enter your employment details to calculate your severance pay
severance.salaryHint: The total salary for the last 3 months is the sum of base salary + allowances for 3 months before resignation. If your monthly salary is 3M KRW, enter approximately 9M KRW.
severance.disclaimer: This calculation is based on the 2026 Korean severance income tax rules and is for reference only. It has no legal effect. Actual severance pay may vary depending on company retirement benefit regulations and pension plan enrollment. Please consult your HR department or a tax professional for accurate calculations.

severanceValidation.endAfterStart: End date must be after start date
severanceValidation.minOneYear: Severance pay requires at least 1 year of service
severanceValidation.enterRecentSalary: Please enter the total salary for the last 3 months

terms.article1Content: These terms establish the conditions and procedures for using the "Salary Calculator" (hereinafter "Service"). The Service provides users with a free tool for calculating estimated after-tax salary based on annual salary.
terms.article2Content: The Service is a tool that calculates estimated net salary based on 2026 Korean simplified wage income tax tables and social insurance rates. All calculation results are provided for reference purposes only and do not substitute for professional tax, legal, or financial advice.
article3Items: Calculation results are for reference only. Their accuracy or completeness is not guaranteed. Results have no legal effect.
Actual salary received may vary depending on year-end tax adjustment, additional deductions, and company-specific payroll systems.
The Service operator is not liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from the use of the Service.
Please consult the National Tax Service or a tax professional for decisions related to taxes and salary.
terms.article4Content: All intellectual property rights for content included in the Service (design, text, source code, logos, etc.) belong to the Service operator. Users may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or commercially use such content without prior written consent.
terms.article5Content: The Service operator may change or suspend all or part of the Service as needed for operational or technical reasons. The Service operator has no obligation to compensate users for damages resulting from service changes or suspension.
terms.article6Content: The Service may include advertisements such as Google AdSense to cover operating costs. Transactions resulting from advertisements are between the user and the advertiser, and the Service operator is not responsible for such transactions.
terms.article7Content: The Service operator may change these terms within the scope of applicable laws, and the changed terms take effect upon announcement within the Service.
terms.article8Content: For inquiries regarding these terms, please contact us at the email below.

privacy.section1Content: The "Salary Calculator" (hereinafter "Service") is a free online tool that calculates estimated after-tax salary for reference. The Service processes minimal personal information and manages it according to the following policy.
privacy.section2Content1: The Service does not require registration. Calculation data such as salary entered by users is processed only within the browser and is not stored on servers.
privacy.section2Content2: However, the following visitor data may be automatically collected through Google Analytics for service improvement and usage analysis.
section2Items: Browser type, operating system, screen resolution
section3Items: Understanding service usage and statistical analysis
Improving service quality and user experience
Error detection and technical problem resolution
privacy.section4Content: Data collected through Google Analytics is processed according to Google's data retention policy, with a default retention period of 14 months. The Service operator does not operate a separate personal information database.
privacy.section5Content1: The Service uses Google Analytics, a web analytics service provided by Google Inc. Google Analytics uses cookies to collect website usage information, which is transmitted to and stored on Google servers. For details, please refer to the
privacy.section6Content: The Service may use cookies for Google Analytics and Google AdSense. Cookies are small data files stored in the user's browser, used for usage analysis and personalized advertising. Users can refuse cookie storage through browser settings, but some features may be limited.
privacy.section7Content: For inquiries regarding personal information processing, please contact us at the email below.
